description:
Interactive Fun with the Knot Rope Bone Toy:
The Knot Rope is an ideal interactive toy for playtime with your pup. It's designed for activities like tug of war and can be used for tossing, catching, and pulling during play sessions. This knotted rope toy is also suitable for supervised solo play, providing a satisfying chew experience for your dog.

Safety and Durability:
Made from premium 100% natural white cotton sourced from North America, our rope toy is biodegradable, safe, and non-toxic. The sturdy knots ensure that it is a durable option for dogs that enjoy chewing, providing a long-lasting plaything.

Oral Health Benefits:
This toy not only offers interactive fun but also supports your dog's oral health. The cotton fibers in the twisted tugs help to floss your dog's teeth as they chew and play, promoting clean teeth and better overall dental hygiene.
